description: Livex Android 3.6.56: Resolves Chordex-to-Hub return black screens via exit pointer-events fail-safe, aligns Stagex landscape scene touch hitboxes with dynamic 3D WebView layers, and expands touch targets to 44x44px concentric bounds.
